description: Archived debate fixtures for baseline variance measurement. Each entry pins a sha256 content hash to detect accidental mutation.

inputs.description: Iteration 1 criteria: harness 구조 개선 closed-loop foundation — structural debate fixture.
Iteration 2 criteria: batch-2/3 adversarial harness + VER helper improvements — methodological debate fixture.
Iteration 4 criteria: multi-provider persona mapping scoping — scoping debate fixture.

hash_policy: TBD hashes resolve to real sha256 values in INC-1b when the referenced fixtures are validated. Until then, this manifest declares the intent; adversarial verification (ac-A.2) runs will fail until INC-1b lands.
